title: Got $7,500? 2 Simple Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: You can easily wrap your head around how these two growth stocks will reward your portfolio.

title: 11 High-Yield Dividend Aristocrats Perfect For The Coming Recession
text: Fears of a recession are mounting, with BAC and Deutsche Bank now forecasting a mild downturn in 2023. A recession could even begin by December 2022. Even without a recession Morgan Stanley is confident stocks have 10% lower to fall. If we get a mild recession, stocks could fall 25% more and in a severe recession, 35%.

title: Signal Says Clorox Stock Could Cool Off Soon
text: The shares of Clorox Co (NYSE:CLX) were last seen down 1.5% to trade at $146.49.

title: Beat the Market Like Zacks: AMN Healthcare, Boeing, Clorox, Home Depot in Focus

title: Want Passive Income? This Company Just Raised Its Dividend (Again)
text: If you can generate enough passive income to cover your expenses, you can retire from working at an early age.

title: Morgan Stanley and 2 Other Companies Raised Their Dividends This Week
text: Banking giant Morgan Stanley lifted its quarterly dividend by 11%, and Clorox, a maker of household products, edged up its quarterly dividend by 2%.

title: Upcoming Ex-Dividend Dates: July 15-28, 2022
text: In this weekly article series, we summarize upcoming ex-dividend dates in a quick reference table. We present relevant data and key statistics in the table, including the next payout amount and pay date.

title: Procter & Gamble Vs. Clorox: Which Is The Better Dividend Stock?
text: PG is the better dividend stock compared with CLX, because it has a superior track record of historical dividend growth and its future dividend growth outlook is more appealing. Procter & Gamble's sales have been growing faster than Clorox, as the former is benefiting from market share gains while the latter is losing share to private labels.

title: Clorox Increases Quarterly Dividend 2% to $1.18 Per Share
text: OAKLAND, Calif. , July 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) announced today that its board of directors has declared a 2% increase in the quarterly dividend, from $1.16 to $1.18 per share on the company's common stock.

title: Clorox Is Great, Yet It Still Seems Overvalued
text: The Clorox Company is on the verge of becoming a dividend king with a 40+ years dividend increase streak. As investors fear a recession, they flock to safer stocks like Clorox.

title: Clorox: A Normalization Was Needed
text: Clorox is a Dividend Champion with 45 consecutive years of dividend growth. Shares currently yield 3.16%. Irrational exuberance pushed Clorox's valuation to extreme levels and a pullback was much needed.

title: Clorox Announces Aug. 3 Webcast of Fourth-Quarter and Fiscal Year 2022 Results
text: OAKLAND, Calif. , July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) will issue its fourth-quarter and fiscal year 2022 results on Aug. 3, 2022.

title: 4 ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividend Hikes Expected This Week
text: After years of a low interest rate environment (though those rates now are trending higher faster), many investors have turned to equities, not only for the growth potential but also for solid and dependable dividends, which help to provide an income stream.
